name: IaC Misconfiguration Detection & Fix
description: Automated detection and remediation workflow for Infrastructure-as-Code misconfigurations in Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes manifests, and Helm charts. Riggs AI analyzes the misconfiguration against cloud security benchmarks (CIS, AWS Well-Architected), determines the risk level, and either auto-generates a fix PR for common issues or escalates complex misconfigurations to the platform engineering team.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: GitHub
required_integrations.reason: Create pull requests with IaC fixes and add review comments to existing PRs

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tickets for complex IaC misconfigurations requiring manual remediation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the platform engineering team about critical infrastructure misconfigurations

data.title: IaC Misconfiguration Detected
data.summary: Triggers when an IaC scanner finds a security misconfiguration

config.description: Ingests IaC misconfiguration findings from Checkov, tfsec, KICS, or Bridgecrew

data.title: AI Misconfiguration Risk Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI assesses the IaC misconfiguration against security benchmarks

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate the IaC misconfiguration: check CIS benchmark violation, assess the real-world attack surface this creates (public exposure, privilege escalation, data exfiltration risk), whether this affects production infrastructure, and whether an automated fix is safe to apply. Consider blast radius of the misconfigured resource.
config.description: AI-powered IaC misconfiguration risk assessment against CIS and cloud security benchmarks

data.title: Critical Risk to Production?
data.summary: Check if the misconfiguration poses a critical risk to production infrastructure

data.title: Alert Platform Engineering
data.summary: Immediately notify the platform engineering team about the critical misconfig

data.title: Create Remediation Ticket
data.summary: Create a high-priority Jira ticket for the critical IaC misconfiguration

config.description: Create a P1 Jira ticket for critical IaC misconfiguration

data.title: Auto-Fix Available?
data.summary: Check if an automated fix can be safely applied for this misconfiguration

data.title: Create Fix PR
data.summary: Auto-generate a pull request with the IaC fix

parameters.title: fix(iac): {{trigger-1.alert.benchmark_id}} — {{trigger-1.alert.resource_type}} misconfiguration

config.description: Create a pull request with the automated IaC misconfiguration fix

data.title: Log for Backlog
data.summary: No auto-fix available — log the non-critical finding for backlog

config.note: IaC misconfiguration logged for backlog remediation. Resource: {{trigger-1.alert.resource_type}}, Rule: {{trigger-1.alert.rule_id}}. No automated fix available.

data.title: End — Critical Escalated
data.summary: Critical IaC misconfiguration escalated to platform engineering

config.summary: Critical IaC misconfiguration escalated. Ticket created and platform engineering notified.

data.title: End — Fix PR or Logged
data.summary: Non-critical IaC misconfiguration handled via PR or backlog

config.summary: IaC misconfiguration handled. Fix PR created or logged for backlog remediation.
